creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
There are some issues reported in the poudriere:

====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
Notice: You have some Perl modules as dependencies but you do not have devel/p5-Module-CoreList installed, the perlcore QA check gets better results when using it, especially with older Perl versions.
Warning: /wrkdirs/usr/ports/multimedia/zoneminder/work/pkg-message not in UCL format, will be shown on initial install only.
Warning: See https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/pkg-files.html#porting-message
====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
Error: Missing: %%DOCSDIR%%/README.FreeBSD
===> Error: Plist issues found.

Can you check them? Thanks!
